failure_modes.text: Iteration can become endless refinement when there are no stop rules or commitment thresholds.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when iteration continues without stop rules, success thresholds, or a decision about what evidence is strong enough to commit.
failure_modes.mitigation: Define stop rules and commitment thresholds before starting: iteration without an exit condition becomes endless refinement.

failure_modes.text: Teams can polish local details while avoiding the need to reset the underlying problem framing or hypothesis.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when teams keep polishing local details while avoiding a reset on the underlying problem framing, hypothesis, or strategy.
failure_modes.mitigation: Check whether the team is polishing details within the current frame or avoiding the harder work of resetting the framing or hypothesis.

failure_modes.text: Premature analysis can turn iteration into inefficient churn because the team starts exploring before defining the real output.
failure_modes.source_quote: The human inclination is to jump into analysis without being perfectly clear about the desired output.
failure_modes.mitigation: Clarify the real output before starting the cycle; premature iteration without a defined target produces churn, not progress.

premortem_questions.text: If we had to stop the project right now, how would we communicate a coherent solution?
premortem_questions.source_quote: How would we communicate a coherent solution if we had to stop the project right now?

premortem_questions.text: Are we currently diagnosing the root cause, or are we jumping ahead to design the solution?
premortem_questions.source_quote: Are we currently diagnosing the root cause, or are we jumping ahead to design the solution?

heuristics.text: Use hypothesis-driven cycles that explicitly revise the leading explanation as evidence accumulates.
heuristics.source_quote: This is a core consulting method where teams establish an initial hypothesis and then continuously gather facts and perform analyses to prove or disprove it.

heuristics.text: Force periodic synthesis so even partial learning becomes a usable next-step plan rather than hidden work in progress.
heuristics.source_quote: This ongoing synthesis forces continuous calibration, ensuring the current level of confidence accurately reflects the work completed, not just the final goal.

heuristics.text: Keep each loop bounded by a clear learning objective and a way to compare the next version against the last one.
heuristics.source_quote: Works best when each loop has a clear learning objective, bounded scope, and a way to compare the next version against the last one.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on bounded loops, synthesis checkpoints, and anti-endless-refinement discipline.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor agile-process sprawl that widened beyond the raw source's stronger hypothesis-loop and one-day-answer material.
open_questions: The second heuristic compresses several synthesis passages so it stays reusable beyond consulting-project wording.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on feedback loops, experimentation, and systems thinking for later relation preservation.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strong on confirmation bias and stale-frame pressure, and the structured tension block names the cleanest current-vocabulary conflicts.
structured_tensions: The source contains an explicit structured tension section that should survive into Wave 3 with only bounded normalization.
